source: Smelling Salts Review — extracted from conversation history line 82
name: Barter Super-Brain — Cross-Grace AI Matching Engine
description: All Graces talk to each other in a super-brain. When Ruby tells Grace she needs help fixing her car, Grace does not just search a database — she asks every other Grace in the network: 'Does anyone's Ruby know how to fix a car?' The Barter Super-Brain is a cross-reference system that matches what Ruby has with what her neighbor needs, and vice versa. It is the AI layer that makes the Good Neighbor Barter system intelligent.
north_star_alignment: Ruby Red has skills, knowledge, and resources that her neighbors need — and they have what she needs. But they do not know each other. The Barter Super-Brain is the matchmaker that turns a neighborhood of strangers into a village of mutual aid.

architecture.individual_grace: Each Ruby has her own Grace instance that knows her skills, needs, schedule, and preferences
architecture.super_brain_layer: All Grace instances share anonymized capability and need data in a collective intelligence layer
architecture.matching_engine: The super-brain continuously matches needs to capabilities across the network
architecture.privacy_boundary: Individual identity is NEVER shared without explicit permission. Grace asks: 'I found someone who can help. Can I connect you?'

matching_flow.trigger: Ruby mentions a need to Grace ('My car has a flat tire and I can't afford a mechanic')
matching_flow.grace_behavior: Grace logs the need and queries the super-brain: 'Any Ruby in a 3-mile radius who can change a tire?'

matching_flow.trigger: Super-brain finds a match — Sarah's Grace knows Sarah is a former mechanic
matching_flow.grace_behavior: Sarah's Grace asks Sarah: 'Your neighbor needs help with a flat tire. She's about 2 blocks away. Would you be willing to help?'
Both Graces facilitate the connection. Ruby's Grace: 'Great news — I found someone who can help. Her name is Sarah and she's just down the street. Can I share your address with her?'
Both Graces log the exchange. Ruby's Grace asks: 'Is there anything you'd like to offer Sarah in return?' The barter ledger is updated.
Grace asks permission to share the story: 'What just happened is beautiful. Can I share it with the village? It might inspire someone else.'

connection_to_other_features.good_neighbor_barter: The Barter Super-Brain is the AI engine behind the Good Neighbor Barter Architecture
connection_to_other_features.big_mama_network: Big Mama is the community layer; the Super-Brain is the intelligence layer
connection_to_other_features.maven_moments: Every successful barter match is a Maven Moment
connection_to_other_features.dignity_score: Barter participation improves Ruby's Dignity Score
connection_to_other_features.grace_concentric_circles: Matching starts at Circle 2 (neighborhood, 3-mile radius) and expands outward

build_complexity: VERY HIGH — requires multi-agent architecture, real-time matching, privacy-preserving data sharing
